name: calendar-watch-onboarder
description: Calendar_Watch_Onboarder — scheduling sub-phase B Task B5. Registers Google Calendar push-notification watch channels: seeds last_sync_token via events.list, creates a per-channel token secret in Secrets Manager, registers the watch via events.watch, writes the channel row to picasso-calendar-watch-channels-{env} with the SHA-256 hash of the token (channel_token encryption Option 2). v1 pilot direct-invoke; future DDB-stream trigger on picasso-employee-registry-v2-{env} when E13 UI / F2 onboarding populates scheduling_tags.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
